summary: Crystal AI backend smoke tested via external URL. 15/17 endpoints pass. Two HIGH/MEDIUM failures: POST /api/flashcards returns 500 due to ObjectId leak in response; POST /api/chat/quiz returns 500 due to Gemini LLM budget error from emergentintegrations. Auth (bearer + cookie), quiz flow, quiz/generate (Gemini real call worked), analytics, pyq, rule2080 all OK.
passed: GET /api/auth/me with Bearer test_session_crystal_001 -> 200 returns user object
GET /api/auth/me with cookie session_token -> 200 (cookie auth works)
GET /api/quiz/next -> 200 returns id/topic/options/difficulty, NO correct_index leak
POST /api/quiz/generate {Physics - Mechanics, difficulty:2} -> 200, real Gemini AI question generated and persisted
GET /api/analytics/summary -> 200 with accuracy, topic_accuracy, weak_topics, strong_topics
GET /api/rule2080?exam=JEE -> 200 ranked topics with share, cumulative, high_impact
JSON serialization clean on all passing endpoints (no ObjectId leaks observed)

failed.issue: Returns HTTP 500. Backend traceback: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable"), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')]. The response_model/return value still contains Mongo `_id` ObjectId, so FastAPI's jsonable_encoder fails when serializing.
failed.evidence: curl -X POST /api/flashcards {front, back, topic} -> HTTP 500. /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log shows ObjectId serialization failure in fastapi.encoders.jsonable_encoder.

failed.issue: Returns HTTP 500. Backend log: emergentintegrations.llm.chat.ChatError: 'litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0'. Note: POST /api/quiz/generate (also Gemini) succeeded, so EMERGENT_LLM_KEY itself works — may be a session/model-specific budget issue with the chat path.
failed.evidence: server.py line 459 chat_quiz -> chat.send_message raises ChatError budget exceeded.

failed.issue: Not verifiable end-to-end because POST /api/flashcards fails (cannot obtain a card id). Endpoint itself was not directly hit with a valid id.

action_items: Fix POST /api/flashcards to strip Mongo `_id` before returning (e.g., del doc['_id'] or return constructed Flashcard Pydantic model). Likely same pattern used elsewhere should be applied here.
Investigate chat/quiz Gemini budget error: confirm session_id / model choice and whether emergentintegrations LlmChat needs reinit, or budget reset; quiz/generate works so key is valid.
After fix, retest POST /api/flashcards and DELETE /api/flashcards/{id} end-to-end.
